name: The Beholden
concept: You were no one. A power lifted you out of the gutter, the ledger, or the grave, and made you useful. Now their reach is your reach, and their leash is always around your throat.
duty: Your power is borrowed. Everything you can do, you can do because someone above you allows it. For now.

look.label: Mark
options: a brand or tattoo, kept covered

gear.label: Tool of the trade
options: a walking cane that is also a club (d6)

gear.label: Insurance
options: a purse of someone else's coin
a single favor token from your patron

moves.name: Strings
moves.trigger: When you arrive somewhere within your patron's reach and quietly put out feelers for a contact, roll +CHA.

results.miss: You still find someone, but the GM holds the Strings against you.

hold.name: Strings
spend: A useful contact is already here and willing to talk.
Someone nearby owes you a small debt you can call in.
You know a back way, a safe room, or a quiet exit.
You produce a token of passage, forged or genuine.

moves.name: Leash
moves.text: You may take +1 Debt to treat a 6- as a 7-9, or a 7-9 as a 10+. The patron remembers every indulgence.

moves.name: Read the Room
moves.trigger: When you enter a charged situation and size it up, roll +WIS.

results.strong: Ask 3. Take +1 forward acting on the answers.
results.weak: Ask 1. Take +1 forward acting on the answers.
results.miss: The GM asks you a question, and you must answer honestly: who here already has your number?

moves.name: A Face for Every Door
moves.trigger: When you pass yourself off as someone you are not, roll +CHA.

results.strong: They buy it until you give them a hard reason not to.
results.weak: They buy it for now, but the GM names the catch.
results.miss: Someone sees right through you, and they are not who you hoped.

moves.name: Collateral
moves.trigger: When you put up something of value as surety to seal a deal:
moves.text: Take +1 ongoing to that deal while the collateral stands. If you forfeit it, mark XP and add 1 Heat.

moves.name: Eyes Everywhere
moves.trigger: When you spend a quiet day in a settlement listening, roll +INT.

results.miss: You hear something, but so does someone who matters: add 1 Heat.

hold.name: Whispers
spend: Learn a secret currently in play in this settlement.

moves.name: The Patron's Purse
moves.text: Declare that your patron staked you. Gain coin or a needed common item now, and add 1 Debt.

moves.name: Hard to Kill
moves.trigger: When you would take a fatal blow:
moves.text: You may add 1 Debt and survive instead, visibly marked by how your patron reached out to save you.

bonds: ____ knew me before my patron did. They remember who I was.
____ has done work for me that could get them hanged, and I hold it gently.
I owe ____ a debt that has nothing to do with my patron, and it galls me.
____ thinks they can get me free of my patron. They are wrong, but I let them believe it.
____ is the only one I would warn before my patron came calling.
communityTie: Your patron wants a foothold in the home. ____, who lives there, does not know you are the wedge.
The home took you in when your patron once cast you off. You would protect ____ there even against orders.
You launder your patron's interests through ____'s business in the home.

tracks.name: Debt
tracks.note: At 6 the patron makes a major demand, then resets to 3.

basic: Take a move from another playbook.
Take a move from another playbook.
Gain a second patron (new Patron Sheet, Bond 0).
Increase your maximum held Strings by 1.
Once per session, your Leash costs no Debt.
Buy a piece of yourself back: reduce standing Debt by 1, permanently.
advanced: Cut the Cord: end your bond with a patron for good, resolving the fallout in play. Choose a new embedment: claim or found a Bastion, or take up a god (start Devotion 1).
Become a Patron: create a small Patron Sheet with you as the gift-giver; others may now Invoke you.
Walk Away: retire to safety, or take up the mantle your patron leaves behind.
